heroSubtitle: We help small businesses respond faster, organize requests, reduce errors and save hours of work every week.
solutionsSectionText: We don’t sell complicated technology. We solve repetitive tasks and slow processes.
service1Text: Receive, organize and automatically route new customer requests.
service2Text: Confirmations, reminders and follow-up to reduce no-shows and calls.
service3Text: Summaries, classification, reports and AI-assisted replies.
service4Text: Centralize information in Google Sheets, dashboards, CRM or databases.
service5Text: Send emails, internal alerts and automatic messages at the right time.
service6Text: Connect tools that today work separately and eliminate manual copy work.
beforeItem1: Requests scattered across email and WhatsApp
afterItem5: Team focused on what creates value
processStep1Text: We identify repetitive tasks and time loss points.
processStep2Text: We present a clear solution with scope, timeline and investment.
processStep3Text: We build, test and connect automation to your tools.
processStep4Text: We deliver documentation and support to ensure stability.
packagesSectionText: The final budget depends on complexity, integrations and workload.
starterPlanText: To eliminate a manual task and start automating.
professionalPlanText: To automate several steps and save hours per week.
premiumPlanText: For complete processes and custom solutions.
packagesNote: Integrations such as WhatsApp Business may require additional setup and costs billed directly by the platform.
project1Text: Collect requests, organize them in Google Sheets and automatically send emails to the client and company.
project2Text: Workflow that analyzes data and automatically sends a personalized report to the lead.
project3Text: Scheduled system to collect information, analyze sentiment and update results automatically.
contactSectionTitle: Discover what you can automate in your company.
contactSectionText: Tell us briefly how you work. You will receive practical suggestions, no strings attached.
formLabelMessage: What would you like to automate?
formPrivacy: Your data will only be used to respond to the request.
contactDirectTitle: Prefer to talk to us directly?
contactResponseTime: We usually respond within 24 working hours.
